name: Gettysburg 1863 land cover — Pickett's Charge corridor + full battlefield

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: Spangler's Woods / Seminary Ridge woods, Pickett's Division formation cover; tree-symbol stipple boundary; north edge merges into continuous ridge stipple beyond the traced corridor

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: the copse of trees at the Angle, just west of the stone wall; small tree-scribble cluster partly obscured by unit labels, extent approximate

features.note: Ziegler's Grove at Woodruff's battery position, Hays's right

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: labeled 'APPLE ORCHARD' on the sheet, at the J. Smith farm east of H. Spangler

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: orchard at the Bliss farm site (buildings marked 'w' on sheet); fruit-tree symbols in loose scatter rather than strict grid; extends slightly north of the traced corridor

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: open ground of Pickett's advance between Spangler's Woods and the Emmitsburg Road; bounded N by a worm fence (zigzag), E by the road fences, W by the woods edge; S boundary along the Spangler farm lane generalized under battle overprint. crop type not distinguished on Bachelder; McElfresh (c, not traced) would refine

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: ground of the final assault between the Emmitsburg Road and the stone wall at the Angle (Webb's front); N edge at the Bryan farm lane. crop type not distinguished on Bachelder; McElfresh (c, not traced) would refine

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: bounded N by the worm-fenced Codori farm lane, E by a post-and-rail fence, W by the Emmitsburg Road; the southern closure is a section cut, no fence legible there at scan resolution. crop type not distinguished on Bachelder; McElfresh (c, not traced) would refine

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: field on Hays's front between the Emmitsburg Road and the wall line, S of the E. Trostle house and W of Ziegler's Grove. crop type not distinguished on Bachelder; McElfresh (c, not traced) would refine

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: the stone wall Webb's men defended, drawn per the sheet legend as a line of continuous fine dots; runs N from S of the copse to the inner angle, jogs ~75 m east (the famous right-angle jog), then N again to the Bryan barn area

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: west flanking fence of the Emmitsburg Road, Sherfy farm to the E. Trostle house; drawn dots-and-dashes = post-and-rail per the sheet legend; north of Codori the linework runs under battle overprint, alignment traced from the road corridor

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: east flanking fence of the Emmitsburg Road, same span as the west fence; drawn dots-and-dashes = post-and-rail per the sheet legend; style partly illegible under battle overprint N of Codori

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02

features.note: enclosed ground at the A. Trostle farm S of the farm lane, W of Plum Run (Bigelow's stand); boundaries partly under battle overprint, closures generalized

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: grass-tuft (wet meadow) symbols along the Plum Run branch W of J. Weikert, N of the Wheatfield Road

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: valley floor of Plum Run between Devil's Den and Little Round Top (the 'Valley of Death'); dot/scrub texture read as wet meadow - the symbols are less explicit than the Rock Creek meadow tufts, hence inferred

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: wooded/hachured mass of Little Round Top down to the saddle toward Round Top; the W face was cleared timber in 1863 but stipple and hachure are not separable at scan resolution under the 5th Corps overprint - boundary generalized

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: Round Top ('ROUND TOP' label on sheet), fully forested; boundary from the continuous tree/hachure mass

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: timber on Houck's Ridge around Devil's Den ('DEVILS DEN' label within the ring); the boulder ground at the S tip is not separable from the stipple; abuts woodlot-rose-woods on the NW

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: open farm ground at the J. Slyder place between the Emmitsburg Road and the Round Top woods (Farnsworth's charge crossed it); scattered lone trees within not traced; internal cross-fences omitted

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: fenced farm lane from the Emmitsburg Road E to the J. Slyder farm (Farnsworth's charge ground); drawn as a single line - the flanking pair is not resolvable at scan resolution

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: Culp's Hill forest over both summits S to the Spangler's Spring saddle ('CULP'S HILL' label on sheet); 12th Corps breastworks inside; W edge toward Stevens Knoll generalized under heavy unit overprint

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
features.note: N flanking fence of the Wheatfield Road from the Peach Orchard crossroads down toward Plum Run (Wofford's Brigade advanced astride this road, per the sheet's advance arrow); alignment generalized under overprint between the orchard and the Wheatfield; only this tactically critical road's fences are traced outside the corridor - ordinary field boundaries are deliberately omitted

features.source: Bachelder Third Day sheet (LOC 99447492, cw0326000c), traced via georeferenced raster measurement 2026-07-02
